title: PICtalky: Augmentative and Alternative Communication for Language Developmental Disabilities
research_areas: T29 NLP for education, Automated essay scoring and feedback generation, grammatical error correction and detection, intelligent tutoring systems
T19 Text Simplification, Plain Language and Assistive Technologies
T17 Multimodality, Cross-modality (including Sign Languages, Vision and Other Modalities), Multimodal Applications, Grounded Language Acquisition
